description:
Simple contacts manager for saving phone numbers, emails, and other contact details for personal or professional use.

Shortcut Windows+Alt+L.
changelog: Universal Compatibility: The add-on now works perfectly on both 32-bit and 64-bit versions of NVDA.

translations.description:
Gerenciador de contatos simples para salvar números de telefone, e-mails e outros detalhes de contato para uso pessoal ou profissional.

Atalho Windows+Alt+L.
translations.changelog: Universal Compatibility: The add-on now works perfectly on both 32-bit and 64-bit versions of NVDA.
